actual_root_cause: AI4I heat-dissipation or power-failure pattern mapped to drive motor thermal/load stress.
action_taken: Accepted plan: Reduce rolling load and isolate the motor at the next safe pass gap.
note: Recommendation accepted from the maintenance review panel.
